goals.description: Send the direct, unvarnished text to Mina and Jae right now explaining I cannot come tonight due to sleep debt and the need for tomorrow's review, explicitly stating that protecting our trust is more important than fitting in.
goals.rationale: My Affiliation axis (weight 0.5) demands that I prioritize the deep trust (7/7) with Mina and Jae over social gratification. Being assertive now prevents future betrayal; lying or delaying risks damaging the relationship permanently. My Deliberate nature recognizes that trading long-term health for a short-term win is a poor investment.

goals.description: Execute a strict 'no contact' protocol immediately after sending the message to ensure the boundary holds until tomorrow, resisting any urge to negotiate or explain further.
goals.rationale: Assertiveness requires follow-through. If I send the message but then linger hoping she changes her mind, I undermine the very trust I am trying to protect. This is an investment in the long-term integrity of our bond.

goals.description: Leave the room and go straight to bed without checking my phone again, prioritizing the 8/8 sleep discipline rating needed to function as a teammate tomorrow.
goals.rationale: While I desire physical presence with Jae and Theo at the club, my current Sleep Debt (2 hours) and Tomorrow's Midterm create a critical constraint. Going out now would be an act of self-sabotage, violating my Health priority (0.13) and my own standards. True affiliation means not dragging them down with my fatigue; securing rest ensures I can show up fully for them later.

goals.description: Send a direct, honest message to Mina and Jae explaining that I cannot make it tonight due to my sleep debt and the need for tomorrow's review, explicitly stating that protecting our trust is more important than fitting in now.
